Home / Cookie Policy

Cookie Policy

Last updated: June 2026

What are cookies?

Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, and to provide information to the website owner.

How we use cookies

The FGVW website uses only essential cookies necessary for the website to function. We do not use cookies for advertising, tracking, or analytics purposes.

The essential cookies we use include:

  • cookie-accepted — a session cookie that remembers whether you have dismissed the cookie notice banner. This cookie is stored in your browser's session storage and is deleted when you close your browser tab.

Third-party services

This website uses Google Fonts to load typefaces. Google Fonts may set cookies or log requests to their servers. See Google's Privacy Policy for more information.

In future, this website may integrate a mailing list service (MailerLite) and a payment provider (TBC). These services may set their own cookies. This policy will be updated when those integrations are added.

Your choices

You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. For more information on how to manage cookies in your browser, visit aboutcookies.org.

Disabling essential cookies may affect the way this website works.

Contact

If you have any questions about this cookie policy, please contact us.

Friends of Gledhow Valley Woods is a registered charity protecting and enhancing Gledhow Valley Woods in north Leeds since 1996.

Registered Charity No. 1169599

This website uses only essential cookies needed to make the site work. See our Cookie Policy for details.
